About Us

About Concord Tree Removal

Professional tree removal, trimming, stump grinding, and emergency storm cleanup serving Concord, NC and the surrounding Cabarrus County communities.

Your Local Tree Care Team

Concord Tree Removal was built to solve a simple problem: homeowners and businesses in the Concord metro need reliable, professional tree service that shows up on time, does quality work, and charges a fair price. No games, no hidden fees, no runaround.

We serve residential and commercial customers across Cabarrus, Rowan, and Mecklenburg counties. Whether you need a single dead branch trimmed or an entire lot cleared for new construction, our crew has the equipment, training, and experience to handle it safely and efficiently.

What Sets Us Apart

Every estimate is free. Every quote is flat-rate. Every job includes complete debris cleanup. We carry full liability insurance and workers' compensation coverage, so your property — and our team — are always protected.

When storms hit Cabarrus County, we respond fast. Our 24/7 emergency line means you're never stuck waiting for Monday morning when a tree is on your roof Saturday night.

Services We Provide

Our core services include tree removal (any size), tree trimming and pruning, stump grinding and removal, emergency storm cleanup, and lot clearing for new construction. We work on residential properties, commercial sites, and municipal projects throughout the Concord metro.

Areas We Serve

We're based in Concord and serve the surrounding communities including Concord, Kannapolis, Harrisburg, Mount Pleasant, Midland, China Grove, Huntersville, Cornelius. If you're in Cabarrus County or nearby, give us a call — we can almost certainly help.

Ready to Get Started?

Call us for a free estimate or fill out our contact form.

Call (704) 313-1555
